basic_details.job_title: RRB JE 04/2026 Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 4098 Junior Engineer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs), Ministry of Railways
basic_details.post_name: Junior Engineer (JE), Depot Material Superintendent (DMS) & Chemical and Metallurgical Assistant (CMA)
basic_details.short_information: The Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs) have released the Centralised Employment Notification (CEN) No. 04/2026 for recruitment to Junior Engineer (JE), Depot Material Superintendent (DMS) and Chemical & Metallurgical Assistant (CMA) posts. Eligible candidates can apply online through the official RRB website.

important_dates.raw: Opening Date of Online Application: 14-08-2026 Closing Date of Online Application: 13-09-2026

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 Years Maximum Age: 33 Years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government rules.

selection_process: Computer Based Test (CBT) Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Visit the official RRB application website rrb.indianrailways.gov.in.
Open the RRB JE CEN 04/2026 recruitment section.
Fill out the application form with correct details.
Submit the application form and take a printout for future reference.

rows.railway_recruitment_boards_rrbs_ministry: Junior Engineer (JE), Depot Material Superintendent (DMS) & Chemical and Metallurgical Assistant (CMA)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Opening Date of Online Application: 14-08-2026 Closing Date of Online Application: 13-09-2026

content_sections.heading: RRB JE Vacancy 2026 - Post Details
content_sections.text: The Railway Recruitment Boards have announced vacancies for Junior Engineer, Depot Material Superintendent and Chemical & Metallurgical Assistant posts. The detailed post-wise vacancy distribution will be available in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Who Can Apply for RRB JE Recruitment 2026?
content_sections.text: Candidates having the required educational qualifications can apply for different posts under RRB JE Recruitment 2026. The eligibility details will be based on the post requirements mentioned in the official notification. Junior Engineer (JE): Candidates with Diploma/Degree in relevant Engineering disciplines. Depot Material Superintendent (DMS): Candidates with relevant Engineering/technical qualifications. Chemical & Metallurgical Assistant (CMA): Candidates with required Chemistry/Metallurgy qualifications.

content_sections.heading: RRB JE Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 Years Maximum Age: 33 Years Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government rules.

content_sections.heading: RRB JE Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Computer Based Test (CBT) Document Verification Medical Examination

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RRB JE Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official RRB application website rrb.indianrailways.gov.in. Open the RRB JE CEN 04/2026 recruitment section. Read the official notification carefully. Complete the online registration process. Fill out the application form with correct details. Upload required documents and photographs. Pay the application fee (if applicable). Submit the application form and take a printout for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are available in RRB JE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: RRB JE Recruitment 2026 includes 4098 vacancies for Junior Engineer, DMS and CMA posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the pay scale for RRB JE posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive Pay Level-6 salary with an initial pay of Rs. 35,400.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for RRB JE Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is 18 to 33 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for RRB JE 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official RRB portal.

faq.question: Q5. What posts are included under RRB CEN 04/2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes Junior Engineer (JE), Depot Material Superintendent (DMS) and Chemical & Metallurgical Assistant (CMA) posts.
